column40: The TABULA reference area is the usable floor area inside the thermal envelope, determined on the basis of internal dimensions (measured from inside surface to inside surface of surrounding walls); considered are spaces with room height > 1,50 m; included are also footprints of stairwells and landings as well as storage and installation rooms, provided that they are located inside the thermal envelope. The so defined TABULA reference floor area is equivalent to the conditioned gross floor area (measured at a room height of 1,50 m) minus the cross-section areas of all included constructions.
